prompt: Dark cinematic reveal: glowing purple mathematical formulas dissolve into a sleek smartphone rising from black, dramatic volumetric light sweeping across the screen, text emerges — 'Quantify every trade with probability math.'
Close-up smartphone floating on dark surface, finger glides to price input field, types '42,850' — interface pulses with soft violet glow, smooth rack focus, premium studio lighting.
Slow cinematic push-in on smartphone screen, finger taps position size field entering '5', subtle animated highlight ripples outward in #6c63ff accent, clean dark UI gleams.
Elegant overhead shot, fingertip adds a price target row — probability percentage fills in, distribution bar animates smoothly, violet gradients cascade across the dark calculator interface.
Dynamic low-angle smartphone shot, thumb taps calculate button, bold expected value result reveals with crisp number animation, purple glow intensifies dramatically across a dark studio backdrop.
Fluid horizontal swipe transitions linear to options mode, interface morphs elegantly, new fields appear with smooth motion, camera orbits the smartphone in soft dramatic side-lighting.
Clean white studio fade-in, minimalist brand card centers on screen, 'EV Calculator' appears in bold, tagline types beneath, purple underline sweeps in, 'Try it free' pulses softly.
